```{=html}
<style>
.paper-list-updated {
  color: #555;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.paper-card {
  border-top: 1px solid #d8dee6;
  padding: 1rem 0 1.1rem 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.paper-card:last-child {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d8dee6;
}

.paper-date {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}

.paper-title {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.paper-authors {
  color: #333;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}

.paper-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
}

.paper-badge,
.paper-category {
  border: 1px solid #d4dce5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #1a6aab;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.82em;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.42rem;
}

.paper-category {
  color: #555;
}
</style>
```

<p class="paper-list-updated"><em>Last updated June 15, 2026. Papers from the last 6 months. See more <a href="contents/all-papers.qmd">here</a>.</em></p>

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Jun 11, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13614v1">Majority-of-Three is Optimal</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Divit Rawal, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13614v1">arXiv:2606.13614v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2606.13614v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">stat.ML, cs.LG, math.ST</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Jun 02, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03973v2">A remark on the majorizing measures theorem for general processes</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Reese Pathak, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03973v2">arXiv:2606.03973v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2606.03973v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, cs.IT, math.ST</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 27, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28677v1">Weak universality for stochastic reaction-diffusion models with long-range correlated noise</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Simon Gabriel, Markus Tempelmayr</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28677v1">arXiv:2605.28677v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.28677v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math.AP</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 18, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19096v1">Sharp analysis of sketched least squares and randomized low-rank approximation</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Ethan N. Epperly, Robert J. Webber</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19096v1">arXiv:2605.19096v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.19096v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA, stat.CO</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 16, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17185v1">Numerical Instabilities in the Kaczmarz Method and Stabilization by Iterative Refinement</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Michał Dereziński, Ethan N. Epperly, Deanna Needell, Alexander Xue</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17185v1">arXiv:2605.17185v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.17185v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 04, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03206v2">The maximum-entropy median-martingale</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Rikhav Shah, Vilas Winstein</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03206v2">arXiv:2605.03206v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.03206v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 02, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01628v1">Self-Normalized Martingales and Uniform Regret Bounds for Linear Regression</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Fan Chen, Jian Qian, Alexander Rakhlin, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01628v1">arXiv:2605.01628v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.01628v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">stat.ML, cs.LG, math.ST</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Apr 30, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27619v1">Rising GUE Eigenvalue Process from a Fixed Level</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zoe Himwich</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27619v1">arXiv:2604.27619v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.27619v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Apr 30, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27287v1">A Levered ETF Anomaly Explained</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Stephen W. Bianchi, Lisa R. Goldberg</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27287v1">arXiv:2604.27287v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.27287v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">q-fin.PM</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Apr 03, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02920v1">Efficient Logistic Regression with Mixture of Sigmoids</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Federico Di Gennaro, Saptarshi Chakraborty, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02920v1">arXiv:2604.02920v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.02920v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.LG</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Mar 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17177v1">Discrete RG flow of a hierarchical singular SPDE</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Leonard Ferdinand, Simon Gabriel</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17177v1">arXiv:2603.17177v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.17177v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Mar 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053v2">Auditing the Auditors: Does Community-based Moderation Get It Right?</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Yeganeh Alimohammadi, Karissa Huang, Christian Borgs, Jennifer Chayes</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053v2">arXiv:2603.18053v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.18053v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.SI, cs.CY, econ.GN</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Mar 03, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02714v2">Gaussian Width of Convex Sets via Integral Decompositions, Projections, and the Distribution of Intrinsic Volumes</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Reese Pathak, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02714v2">arXiv:2603.02714v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.02714v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, cs.IT, math.ST</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 26, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22509v1">Fluctuations in the weakly coupled 4D Anderson Hamiltonian</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Simon Gabriel, Tommaso Rosati</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22509v1">arXiv:2602.22509v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.22509v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math.AP</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 18, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16797v1">Fast, High-Accuracy, Randomized Nullspace Computations for Tall Matrices</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Ethan N. Epperly, Taejun Park, Yuji Nakatsukasa</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16797v1">arXiv:2602.16797v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.16797v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 18, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16142v2">Ratio Covers of Convex Sets and Optimal Mixture Density Estimation</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Spencer Compton, Gábor Lugosi, Jaouad Mourtada, Jian Qian, Nikita Zhivotovskiy</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16142v2">arXiv:2602.16142v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.16142v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.ST, cs.CG, cs.LG</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.15822v1">Finite Free Information Inequalities</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Jorge Garza-Vargas, Nikhil Srivastava, Zachary Stier</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.15822v1">arXiv:2602.15822v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.15822v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math.CA, math.CO</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 05, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05394v2">Linear Systems and Eigenvalue Problems: Open Questions from a Simons Workshop</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Noah Amsel, Yves Baumann, Paul Beckman, Peter Bürgisser, Chris Camaño, Tyler Chen, Edmond Chow, Anil Damle et al.</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05394v2">arXiv:2602.05394v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.05394v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA, cs.DS</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 05, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05192v2">First Proof</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Mohammed Abouzaid, Andrew J. Blumberg, Martin Hairer, Joe Kileel, Tamara G. Kolda, Paul D. Nelson, Daniel Spielman, Nikhil Srivastava et al.</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05192v2">arXiv:2602.05192v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.05192v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.AI, math.AG, math.CO</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 04, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04842v2">The matrix-vector complexity of $Ax=b$</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Michał Dereziński, Ethan N. Epperly, Raphael A. Meyer</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04842v2">arXiv:2602.04842v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.04842v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.DS, math.NA, math.OC</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Jan 23, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.16377v2">Macroscopic asymptotics in discrete beta-ensembles and random tilings</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Gaëtan Borot, Vadim Gorin, Alice Guionnet</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.16377v2">arXiv:2601.16377v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.16377v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math-ph</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Jan 20, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.14170v1">Wasserstein distances between ERGMs and Erdős-Rényi models</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Vilas Winstein</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.14170v1">arXiv:2601.14170v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.14170v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, cond-mat.stat-mech, cs.DM</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Jan 12, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07169v2">Approximate FKG inequalities for phase-bound spin systems, with applications to central limit theorems for exponential random graphs</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Satyaki Mukherjee, Vilas Winstein</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07169v2">arXiv:2601.07169v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.07169v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, cond-mat.stat-mech, cs.DM</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Dec 19, 2025</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.17823v2">van den Berg-Kesten--type correlation inequalities for disjoint polymers in the KPZ universality class</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Shirshendu Ganguly, Milind Hegde, Lingfu Zhang</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.17823v2">arXiv:2512.17823v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2512.17823v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math-ph</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Dec 17, 2025</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.15929v1">Make the most of what you have: Resource-efficient randomized algorithms for matrix computations</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Ethan N. Epperly</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.15929v1">arXiv:2512.15929v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2512.15929v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA, cs.DS, stat.CO</span>
</div>
:::
